Plano · Frisco · Texas

Aesthetic medicine, refined
to the millimeter.

From Ultherapy and Sculptra to cord blood stem cell infusion, Derma Med Spa brings clinical precision and a quiet, elevated atmosphere to every treatment — across two boutique clinics in Plano and Frisco.

8+
Years in DFW
Ultherapy Prime ✦ Sculptra ✦ CO₂ Laser Resurfacing ✦ Allergan Botox ✦ PDO Threads Lift ✦ Juvéderm ✦ RF Microneedling ✦ PRP ✦ NAD+ IV Therapy ✦ Cord Blood Stem Cells ✦ Ultherapy Prime ✦ Sculptra ✦ CO₂ Laser Resurfacing ✦ Allergan Botox ✦ PDO Threads Lift ✦ Juvéderm ✦ RF Microneedling ✦ PRP ✦ NAD+ IV Therapy ✦ Cord Blood Stem Cells ✦
Two Clinics

Where to find us.

Each location specializes in distinct treatment pillars. Plano focuses on laser and skin-care therapies; Frisco is our advanced injectables, regenerative medicine, and IV infusion campus.

Plano

The science
of looking like yourself.

Live Concierge — Online Now

Get a free skin analysis
or book — right here.

Tell our concierge what's on your mind. She knows every treatment, every price, both clinics, and can book your 1-hour appointment between 8 AM and 4 PM, any day of the week. No phone tag, no waiting room.

Free skin analysisShare your concerns, get a personalized treatment plan in seconds.
Live booking1-hour slots, 8 AM – 4 PM, 7 days a week. Confirmed instantly.
Voice or textTap the mic to talk, or type. Whatever feels natural.
Every price, every procedureFull menu memorized. Ask anything — Botox, Ultherapy, IV drips, all of it.

Tap the chat to start with any of these.

Live Now
Transparent Pricing

No guesswork.
No hidden fees.

Every treatment is priced clearly with bulk savings on prepaid packages. VIP members enjoy exclusive pricing.

Anti-Aging Device
Ultherapy Therapy

Non-surgical skin lifting. 450 to 1,200 shots. 1–2 sessions per year.

$1,500– $3,450
Injectable
Allergan Botox®

FDA-approved. Buy 200u get 50u free / 300u get 80u free.

$12per unit
Filler
Juvéderm® / Restylane®

Premium HA fillers. Buy 3 get 1 free. Buy 5 get 2 free.

$800per syringe
Laser
CO₂ Laser Resurfacing

10–12 sessions, every 2–3 weeks. Prepaid packages from $1,350.

$500per session
Regenerative
PRP Face / Hair

Buy 2 get 1 free. Buy 3 get 2 free. Stimulates natural collagen.

$800per session
IV Therapy
NAD+ Regenerate IV

500ml fluid · NAD+ · Zofran. Overseen by Medical Director.

$288per infusion

"Want the full pricing list? Just ask the concierge above — instant answers."

Ask the Concierge →
The House Philosophy

Friendly service,
medical-grade results.

We're experts at what we do. But knowing the best techniques is only part of the process — we're also here to make you feel great. Whether you're here for a one-hour service or an entire day, your happiness is of utmost importance.

Our complimentary consultations offer holistic skincare advice — from concerns like wrinkles and dermal remodelling to managing how your skin is making you feel. Book a 10- or 30-minute phone call or chat with the AI concierge anytime.

Derma Med Spa

Luxury medical aesthetics in Plano and Frisco, Texas. Established in DFW with two boutique clinics and a training academy.
